output.formatted_prompt:
Produce the FINAL structured output.

DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: Your checkout page is not accessible. Specific failures documented by our accessibility auditor: (1) Payment form fields lack ARIA labels — screen readers announce them as 'edit text' with no context, (2) Error messages are conveyed through color alone (red text on red-bordered input) — fails WCAG 2.1 AA 1.4.1, (3) The 'Place Order' button is a div with an onClick handler, not a native button — it's unreachable via keyboard, invisible to screen readers, (4) After a successful order, focus doesn't move to the confirmation — screen reader users don't know the order succeeded, (5) Your CAPTCHA has no audio alternative. We have a legally binding settlement agreement from an ADA lawsuit requiring our public-facing purchasing interfaces (including third-party integrations like yours) to be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant by June 1st. If your platform doesn't meet this, we either need a compliant remediation timeline or we must terminate and find an accessible alternative. Our lawyer will need a written commitment.

ROUTING DECISION: shortlist
